description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On August 24, 2025 at 12:43 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Beverly Boulevard at N. Curson Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling westbound in the rightmost lane on Beverly Boulevard when it began to slow as it approached a red light at 
the intersection at N. Curson Avenue. A passenger car that was traveling westbound in the adjacent lane proceeded to change lanes and 
approached the Waymo AV and a stopped SUV in the adjacent lane from behind as it was traveling in between lanes. The front right of the 
passenger car made contact with the rear left of the Waymo, and the left of the passenger car also made contact with the right of the stopped 
SUV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV, the passenger car, and 
the SUV sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
